name: enforce-best-practices
description: Workflow to review code for Flutter best practices including null safety, error handling, code organization, and performance patterns

workflowSteps.name: Code Structure Review
workflowSteps.description: Check file organization, naming conventions, and folder structure

workflowSteps.name: Null Safety Check
workflowSteps.description: Verify proper null safety usage and null checks

workflowSteps.name: Error Handling
workflowSteps.description: Ensure proper try-catch, error states, and user feedback

workflowSteps.name: Performance Patterns
workflowSteps.description: Check for const constructors, unnecessary rebuilds, and optimization opportunities

workflowSteps.name: Testing Coverage
workflowSteps.description: Verify adequate test coverage for business logic and UI

workflowSteps.name: Documentation
workflowSteps.description: Check for code comments, documentation, and README updates
